title: Forældelse — prescription tracking and interruption
note: Manual execution only — requires a running docker-compose stack with ≥4 ACTIVE foraeldelse_record rows (fd00-001..005).

flows.title: FR-7.1 Sagsbehandlerportalen viser forældelsesstatus med ISO-dato og udskydelse
steps: Assert 4 dd elements are visible in the status dl
flows.precondition: Any valid fordringId (circuit-breaker fallback works for structural check)

flows.title: FR-7.2 Sagsbehandlerportalen viser afbrydelseshistorik med resulting new frist
steps: POST 2 afbrydelse events via debt-service API for activePairs[0].fordringId
Navigate to limitation panel for that fordring
Assert each row has type, date, legal reference, new frist columns
flows.precondition: ≥1 fordring with ACTIVE foraeldelse_record row in debt-service DB

flows.title: FR-7.3 Sagsbehandlerportalen viser tillægsfristhistorik og fordringskompleks-medlemskab
steps: Navigate to limitation panel for fordringA
Assert h2:has-text('Fordringskompleks') is visible and fordringB is listed
Assert h2:has-text('Tillægsfristhistorik') is visible with ≥1 row
Assert sourceFordringId and targetFordringId column headers are attached

flows.title: FR-7.4 Sagsbehandler med skriveadgang ser knap til registrering af forældelsesindsigelse
steps: Navigate to limitation panel for ACTIVE fordring

flows.title: FR-7.5 Afventende indsigelse viser evalueringsformular med rationalefelt
steps: Assert 'Registrer forældelsesindsigelse' button is NOT visible
flows.precondition: ≥2 fordringer with ACTIVE foraeldelse_record rows (uses activePairs[1])

flows.title: FR-7.6 Forældet fordring viser udfald og rationale uden registreringsknap
steps: PUT /indsigelse/{indsigelsesId} with outcome=VALID to move to FORAELDET
Assert statusLabel 'Forældet' is present in Udfald section
Assert rationale text is present in Udfald section
Assert 'Registrer forældelsesindsigelse' button is NOT visible
flows.precondition: ≥3 fordringer with ACTIVE foraeldelse_record rows (activePairs[2] is mutated)

flows.title: FR-7.7 Read-only caseworker ser panelet men ingen skrivehandlinger
steps: Navigate to limitation panel for any fordringId
Assert button 'Registrer afbrydelseshændelse' is NOT visible
Assert button 'Registrer forældelsesindsigelse' is NOT visible
flows.precondition: Any valid fordringId (circuit-breaker fallback works for read-only check)
